raw_title: Local Experience, National Media, and Misperceptions of the COVID-19 Pandemic
title_en: Local Experience, National Media, and Misperceptions of the COVID-19 Pandemic
title_zh: 地方经验、国家媒体与对COVID-19大流行的误解
keywords_zh: 严重急性呼吸综合征冠状病毒2（SARS-CoV-2）
plain_summary_zh: 这项研究探讨了人们如何通过地方经验和国家媒体报道来理解COVID-19大流行，以及这些因素如何导致误解。它关注公众对疫情的看法如何受到不同信息来源的影响。
plain_summary_en: This study examines how people understand the COVID-19 pandemic through local experiences and national media coverage, and how these factors contribute to misperceptions. It focuses on how public views of the pandemic are shaped by different information sources.
research_direction_zh: 研究媒体与公众对健康危机的认知之间的关系，特别关注地方和国家层面信息的影响。
research_direction_en: Investigating the relationship between media and public perceptions of health crises, with a focus on the influence of local and national information sources.
